user.title: Schedule Manager
user.description:
This integration adds:

• Hub — one device with the status sensor and the global enable switch.
• One device per schedule you create (e.g. Living room) — each has its own switch to enable or disable that schedule.

**New schedule:** Settings → Devices & services → Schedule Manager → entry menu (⋮) or the integration card → **Configure** → **Create schedule**.

On the next screen you can rename devices and assign rooms. "Ignore and finish" skips naming and completes setup.

Only one Schedule Manager integration can be added (no duplicates).

abort.already_configured: Schedule Manager is already configured. Remove the existing entry in Settings if you need to start over.

init.title: Schedule Manager
init.description: Create a schedule or open advanced settings.

add_schedule.title: New schedule
add_schedule.description: A device and a switch will be created for this schedule. Add time blocks from the Schedule Manager Lovelace card or with the schedule_manager.update_schedule service.

advanced.title: Advanced settings
advanced.description: Options for overrides and related behaviour.

error.empty_name: Enter a name for the schedule.

abort.storage_unavailable: Schedule Manager storage is not available. Restart Home Assistant or reload the integration.

time_blocks.name: Time blocks
time_blocks.description: List of blocks. Each block has start_time, end_time and either actions (non-empty list of action_type + action_payload) or the legacy flat action_type + action_payload.

repeat_days.name: Repeat days
repeat_days.description: Days of the week (0 = Monday … 6 = Sunday).

schedule_id.name: Schedule ID
schedule_id.description: UUID of the schedule to enable.

schedule_id.name: Schedule ID
schedule_id.description: UUID of the schedule to disable.

schedule_id.name: Schedule ID
schedule_id.description: UUID of the schedule to delete.

update_schedule.name: Update schedule
update_schedule.description: Update an existing schedule (name, enabled, days, time blocks).

schedule_id.name: Schedule ID
schedule_id.description: UUID of the schedule to update.

time_blocks.name: Time blocks
time_blocks.description: Full list of blocks when editing slots (replaces existing). Each block: start_time, end_time, and actions[] or legacy action_type / action_payload.

override_id.name: Override ID
override_id.description: UUID of the override to clear.

run_actions.name: Run actions
run_actions.description: Immediately run actions for the active time block(s) (similar to scheduler.run_action). Without schedule_id: for all enabled schedules, runs every active block whose start time equals the latest start among currently active blocks (so multiple schedules with the same start time all run). With schedule_id: active block for that schedule only.

schedule_id.name: Schedule ID
schedule_id.description: Optional schedule UUID to force which schedule’s active block is used.
